executive_summary: VR healthcare elderly market is real (~$840M SAM) with 16.8% CAGR, but the specific niche of VR social platform with AI virtual pets for elderly is unproven with a conservative SOM of ~$16.8M and only 1 clearly identifiable early adopter segment (senior living facility operators).
score_reasoning: Score: 57/100 — Data Availability: 19/25 (6+ estimates from 3+ institutional sources — Grand View Research, Fortune Business Insights, Mordor Intelligence, Precedence Research — published 2024-2025; estimates converge within 2x for VR healthcare and companion robots markets) Market Scale (SOM): 13/25 (SOM ~$16.8M based on 2% of $840M SAM; SAM derived from healthcare companion robots geriatric segment at 40.2% of $2.09B market; falls in $10M-$100M tier but at lower end) Growth Trajectory: 16/25 (CAGR 16.8% for VR in healthcare from Grand View Research 2024-2030; companion robots CAGR 17.62%; elder care assistive robots 14.31%; median ~16.8% falls in 10-24% tier, solidly mid-range) Early Adopter Identifiability: 9/25 (1 segment meeting all 3 criteria: senior living facility operators who already spend on Rendever VR and companion tech, reachable via Argentum conferences and Senior Housing News with 50K+ industry reach; family caregivers partially qualify but lack evidence of VR spending) Total: 19 + 13 + 16 + 9 = 57

tam.source: Grand View Research 2024 — VR in Healthcare Market

sam.source: Healthcare companion robots geriatric segment (40.2% of $2.09B, Grand View Research 2024) as proxy for elderly immersive companion tech

som.source: 2% of SAM ($840M) using scoring convention TAM-size scale for $1B-$10B parent market

data.growth_source: Grand View Research — VR in Healthcare Market Report 2024

early_adopters.segment: Senior living facility operators (assisted living, memory care, long-term care communities)
early_adopters.evidence_of_spending: 700+ communities already use Rendever VR ($subscription model); Sonida Senior Living increasing tech budget 30% in 2025; 50%+ of major operators incorporate VR programs; operators purchase Joy for All companion pets, ElliQ robots
